shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg -n \"getItemProps|onMouseDown|preventDownshiftDefault|useCombobox\" src test* __tests__ 2>/dev/null | head -240 && printf '\\n-- files --\\n' && rg --files | head -120"

/bin/bash -lc "git show --stat --oneline 19f6bc0 && git show 19f6bc0 -- src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getItemProps.test.js && sed -n '330,420p' src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js && sed -n '1,180p' src/hooks/useCombobox/testUtils.js"
/bin/bash -lc "git branch -a && git fsck --no-reflogs --unreachable 2>/dev/null | head -30 && git log -1 --format='%H %s'"
/bin/bash -lc 'npx eslint src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getItemProps.test.js && git diff --check && git status --short'
